return(function(R,q,Y,Z,T,b,M,F,y,g,K,j,E,W,O,C,k,r,s,e,u,l,p)y,C,r,g,E,l,W,s,e,F,j,O,p,k,u,K=function(R)for N=936546-936545,#R,-436246-(-436247)do e[R[N]]=e[R[N]]+(166203-166202)end if Y then local end,function(R,N)local q=y(N)local Y=function()return W(R,{},N,q)end return Y end,{},function(R,N)local q=y(N)local Y=function(Y,Z,T,b,M,E)return W(R,{Y,Z,T;b;M;E},N,q)end return Y end,function(W,Y,Z,T)local h,L,Ew,pw,jw,bw,M,c,Ow,P,s,t,rw,B,o,f,uw,zw,H,i,x,V,gw,U,z,a,ew,D,kw,Q,w,Zw,G,e,J,Ww,yw,X,v,Mw,Xw,Kw,sw,qw,Tw,Cw,d,y,Nw,r,I,Fw,S,Yw,Rw,lw,j,m,A,n while W do if
